data:
3 suppliers were contacted.

Workstation Parts GmbH offered RTX 4070 Super Compact at €650 with 5-day delivery and 2-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.
CompuTech Distribution offered RTX 4060 Ti at €420 with 4-day delivery and 2-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.
RapidShip Components offered RTX 4070 at €620 with 2-day delivery and 1-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.

Recommended supplier: CompuTech Distribution — RTX 4060 Ti at €420, 4-day delivery.
Reason: Best balance of compatibility, price, delivery, warranty, and risk.

Human approval required: The recommended offer scored 85/100 (€420, 4-day delivery). Do you approve this procurement recommendation?
